fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Starting Date for G/L Transfer
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of when general ledger entries are transferred to cost accounting.

fields.name: Align G/L Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies how changes in the chart of accounts are carried over to the chart of cost types.

fields.name: Align Cost Center Dimension
fields.tooltip: Specifies how changes in dimensions are carried over to the chart of cost centers.

fields.name: Align Cost Object Dimension
fields.tooltip: Specifies how changes in dimensions are carried over to the chart of cost centers.

fields.name: Last Allocation ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number series for allocations.

fields.name: Last Allocation Doc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last document number that is assigned to all the entries that were generated with the same allocation ID during allocation.

fields.name: Auto Transfer from G/L
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the cost accounting is updated in the general ledger after every posting.

fields.name: Check G/L Postings
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the predefined cost center or cost object already exists in cost accounting when you post to the general ledger.

fields.name: Cost Center Dimension
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost center code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.

fields.name: Cost Object Dimension
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost object code. The code serves as a default value for cost posting that is captured later in the cost journal.
